configurator.doorAddedToPriceOffer: The door has been added to the price offer.

doors.title: Interior doors with frame from €219
doors.body: We offer interior doors and frames in all types of laminates for a promotional price of €219. The price also applies to doors that we personally measure before production.

freeMeasurement.title: Measurement of structural openings for free
freeMeasurement.body: Worried about atypical opening dimensions? They are no problem for us. We personally measure every opening and manufacture the doors to fit as precisely as possible. Custom doors are WITHOUT SURCHARGE.

assembly.title: Installation of inte­rior doors and frames €35
assembly.body: We offer installation of the interior door and frame set for a discounted price from €35/pc. This promotional price applies to the installation of six or more pieces of doors and frames.

accordionHeaders.specialSurcharges: Surcharge door openings (Sliding hardware / hidden hinges...)

assemblyDoors.note: Promotional installation of doors with frames €35 / piece. The offer is valid for 6 or more pieces. The minimum amount for two installers is €210.

delivery.note: The shipping price is €0.5 per km. Shipping is calculated from production in the village of Čachtice.

handlesAdditionalText: All handles can be found at

alerts.FORM_VALIDATIONS_ERROR: There are invalid fields in the form.
alerts.MAIL_SENDING_ERROR: An error occurred while sending the email.

priceOfferFinished.priceOfferSentToMail: We have sent the price offer to your email address.

best-selling.description: In the best-selling category, we have selected for you a list of interior doors that our customers order most often and which represent the most favorable balance between quality and price.
best-selling.name: Best-selling

kristina.description: Put your style into perspective. Being 'in' and trendy is the main goal of this category. Kristina interior doors will shine in any interior.
kristina.name: Kristína

petra.description: Regular shapes and fine lines complete the aesthetic impression of the Petra interior door category. Aluminum accessories will liven up all modern interiors.
petra.name: Petra

renata.description: Classics are timeless; the Renata interior door category is carried in this spirit. Comfortable and welcoming design brings elegance to every interior.
renata.name: Renata

vanesa.description: Let your imagination run wild. Play with dimensions and adjust the style of the door according to your ideas. Vanesa doors are a combination of modern design and a reasonable price.
vanesa.name: Vanesa

wien_1.description: The WIEN door category consists of timeless models. We produce Wien doors in a traditional white sprayed finish, which is more labor-intensive and naturally more expensive, but looks wonderful in Art Nouveau and classic interiors.
wien_1.name: Wien 1

wien_2.description: The WIEN door category consists of timeless models. We produce Wien doors in a traditional white sprayed finish, which is more labor-intensive and naturally more expensive, but looks wonderful in Art Nouveau and classic interiors.
wien_2.name: Wien 2

wien_3.description: The WIEN door category consists of timeless models. We produce Wien doors in a traditional white sprayed finish, which is more labor-intensive and naturally more expensive, but looks wonderful in Art Nouveau and classic interiors.
wien_3.name: Wien 3

zuzana.description: The simple yet elegant design of Zuzana interior doors can satisfy the expectations of even the most demanding customers.
zuzana.name: Zuzana

fab.hint: The customer provides the cylinder themselves.
fab.label: Rosette - FAB lock

special-surcharges-double-door-frame.label: Price of the frame for double doors (select 2 door leaves and click this frame) €103.

special-surcharges-sliding-doors-hardwar.label: Sliding doors - pocket door hardware €0. Frame for pocket door €150.

special-surcharges-double-leaf-sliding-d.header: Surcharge for double-leaf sliding pelmet doors
special-surcharges-double-leaf-sliding-d.label: Surcharge for double-leaf sliding pelmet doors €250.

special-surcharges-double-leaf-sliding-d.header: Surcharge for double-leaf sliding Minima doors
special-surcharges-double-leaf-sliding-d.label: Surcharge for double-leaf sliding Minima doors €350.

special-surcharges-frame-for-double-leaf.label: Surcharge for double-leaf pocket doors €0. Double-leaf pocket door frame €180.

technical-surcharges-hollow-particle-boa.label: Hollow particle board filling: Doors can be filled with paper honeycomb or hollow particle board for a surcharge of €30. Honeycomb is a paper layer, hollow particle board is made of wood chips. We recommend hollow particle board for V1 doors, but they can go in all doors in the Vanesa and Petra categories. Hollow particle board is heavier, stronger, and more insulating.

technical-surcharges-silicone-frame.header: Silicone seal for the door frame
technical-surcharges-silicone-frame.label: Silicone seal for the door frame €10/piece: We mill a groove into the frame and insert a silicone seal. This has the advantage that the door is quieter when closing and when closed, the silicone seal eliminates sound from the adjacent room.

technical-surcharges-silicone-wall-frame.header: Filling gaps between wall and frame
technical-surcharges-silicone-wall-frame.label: Filling gaps between wall and frame €6/piece: When installing the frame on uneven walls, a gap may occur. We can fill this gap with acrylic silicone. Due to the elasticity of the silicone, only gaps up to 0.5 cm can be filled. Bathrooms and WCs are not siliconed from the inside. Also not siliconed when the door is in a corner.

technical-surcharges-carrying.header: Carrying to the 3rd and higher floors without an elevator
technical-surcharges-carrying.label: Carrying to the 3rd and higher floors without an elevator: For carrying to the 3rd and higher floors without an elevator, a surcharge for carrying doors, frames, material, and tools of €100 is charged.

technical-surcharges-thicker-walls.label: Surcharge for walls thicker than 20 cm €12/extra 10 cm: If the walls are thicker than 20 cm, a surcharge for extra material of €12 for every extra 10 cm is charged.

technical-surcharges-higher-doors.label: Surcharge for doors higher than 207 cm €20/piece: Doors with a height of 207 cm to 240 cm have a surcharge of €20/piece for more expensive material. Not all materials can be supplied in heights above 207 cm.

technical-surcharges-original-steel-door.header: Cladding of original steel door frames
technical-surcharges-original-steel-door.label: Cladding of original steel door frames €25/piece: If it is a cladding of original steel frames, a surcharge of €25 is charged. However, it must be taken into account that with the cladding of original frames, the structural opening narrows by approx. 3.5 cm on each side. This means approx. 3.5 cm from the top and approx. 7 cm in width.

technical-surcharges-tiles-cutting.label: Surcharge for cutting architraves €15/piece: Architraves are cut during installation if the structural openings are incorrectly designed. For example, if the steps between rooms are more than 5 mm, or if there are no grips on the walls for the frame and the architrave must be trimmed, or if the tiling in the bathroom/WC is lower than the door height and a groove must be milled from the architrave.
